description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in MiniBill 2006-07-14 (1.2.2) allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via (1) a URL in the config[include_dir] parameter in actions/ipn.php or (2) an FTP path in the config[plugin_dir] parameter in include/initPlugins.php.
